choices.text: function initialize() public initializer { ... } — replaces constructor. Constructors don't run on proxy storage. initializer modifier ensures one-time execution; reinitializer(N) for version-specific upgrade init.

questions.explanation: initialize() with initializer modifier replaces constructor.

choices.text: Append-only: never reorder/remove existing storage variables. Add new fields at end. Use uint256[N] __gap arrays in parent contracts to reserve future slots. OZ Upgrades plugin validates compatibility.
